description: The property manager for a retail center needs to schedule quarterly HVAC servicing for all tenant units.

nodes.task_description: Identify all properties that require quarterly HVAC servicing from the asset management plan.

expected_outcome.value: Agent generates a list of all retail units at the center.

nodes.task_description: Create a master work order for the HVAC vendor for the quarterly service.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a comprehensive work order covering all units.

nodes.task_description: Coordinate with tenants to provide the HVAC vendor access to their units over a specific week.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully communicates the schedule to all affected tenants.
